description: MIT-licensed pip-installable MCP for Google Merchant Center on Merchant API v1 (126 tools).
name: io.github.kiwoongeom/gmc-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your 10-digit Google Merchant Center account ID (top-right of merchants.google.com).
environmentVariables.name: GMC_ACCOUNT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a Google Cloud service-account JSON key file. The service account must be added as Admin in Merchant Center.
environmentVariables.name: GMC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to an OAuth user-token JSON file produced by `gmc-mcp auth-init`. Use this OR GMC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: GMC_OAUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional sub-account ID when operating an MCA (Multi-Client Account).
environmentVariables.name: GMC_SUBACCOUNT_ID

environmentVariables.description: When 'true', writes are logged to the audit log only (no actual API calls).
environmentVariables.name: GMC_DRY_RUN

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR.
environmentVariables.name: GMC_LOG_LEVEL
